title: Dulux Once Gloss Paint For Wood And Metal - Pure Brilliant White 750 ml
description: From the manufacturer Dulux Once Gloss Paint For Wood And Metal Dulux Once Gloss is a one coat gloss paint for interior wood and metal surfaces. Apply using a clean, good quality brush. Apply a thick even coat of paint taking care not to spread it too far. Failure to do so may require a second coat, particularly when painting over a darker colour with a lighter topcoat. Leave a minimum of 16 hours between coats. Edge technology has been used in the development of this product, the nature of solvent based paints means that they will discolour over time. The rate of discolouration is faster in areas with low natural or UV light. For long lasting whiteness we recommend the use of a water based formulation , available in the Dulux Quick Dry range Tips & Advice Preparing the Surfaces: Remove flaking or defective paint and sand down the surface to remove any sheen. Refer to health, safety and environmental information. Make sure the surface is clean (no dirt or grease) and dry. Cleaning: For best results, scrape off excess paint from the brush and clean with Polycell Brush Cleaner. Storing: Store paint in dry conditions and protect from extreme temperatures.
